Class Character

java.lang.Object
logic.entity.Character
All Implemented Interfaces:
Attackable, AttackAnimation, Damageable
Direct Known Subclasses:
HybridClass, MeleeClass, RangedClass
public abstract class Character extends Object implements Attackable, Damageable, AttackAnimation
Base abstract character model shared by all playable classes.

Provides stats, combat state, weapon sprite handling, animation state, and skill state. Concrete subclasses define attack style, animation frames, and buff reset behavior.

  • Constructor Details

    • Character

      public Character(int hp, int atk, int def, int attackRange, float attackSpeed, int maxHp)
      Creates a character with explicit base stats.
      Parameters:
      hp - initial HP
      atk - initial attack
      def - initial defense
      attackRange - initial attack range
      attackSpeed - initial attack speed
      maxHp - maximum HP cap

    • Character

      public Character()
      Creates a character with fallback default stats.

      startX - world X spawn/start position
      startY - world Y spawn/start position
      facingRight - character facing direction
      player - owning player context
